headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -79.5)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 394% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 145 quotes and 109 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious grievances today.

• The frustration score of 56.2 sits in the middle range for this period, though it dropped from yesterday's much higher peak.

• Fears improved notably from yesterday's low while optimism remains stuck near its worst levels.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
